_doc: SHADOW omission-probes for the recursive learning loop (reflect_capture.py). Keyed by project. A probe fires when a session WRITES a path matching any trigger_files substring but NONE of required_any appears as a tool name / Bash command / tool input. Firings are shadow (no surface) until they clear a PPV gate. First-draft predicates — expect tuning from shadow data; high FP is acceptable here by design (plan 4d40085a, review finding #2).
